prestazioni: 3.0L EcoDiesel Hurricane I6 (EZD) engine: BorgWarner EFR 8374 turbocharger upgrade (1.28 A/R, 62mm inducer, 83mm exducer) with custom 3D-printed titanium compressor housing for optimized airflow and reduced lag, paired with a custom-tuned Bosch CP4.2 high-pressure fuel pump (1,800 bar) and Denso G4S 1,000cc/min injectors for E85 compatibility

Full custom exhaust system by MagnaFlow using 3.5-inch mandrel-bent 304 stainless steel tubing with a dual-mode valvetronic setup (quiet/crackle mode) and a custom-fabricated 3.5-inch resonator delete, terminating in a pair of Borla Atak 3.5-inch cat-back mufflers with quad 5-inch rolled-edge tips for aggressive sound without drone

KW Suspensions Clubsport 3-way adjustable coilovers with remote reservoirs, custom valving for the Wagoneer's 5,800lb weight, and spherical top mounts for precise alignment control, paired with Eibach Pro-Spacer 25mm wheel spacers to eliminate scrub radius and improve turn-in response
estetica: Rocket Bunny Widebody Kit (Type 3) for Wagoneer, featuring hand-laid carbon fiber fenders with integrated air vents, custom front splitter with adjustable canards, and a rear diffuser with dual 4-inch exhaust cutouts, all finished in a custom 'Fathom Blue' satin wrap with matte black accents

HRE FF17 24x12.5-inch forged wheels in a custom 'Brushed Titanium' finish with a +35mm offset, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (305/30R24) for aggressive stance and track-ready grip, paired with Brembo GT 6-piston 405mm front and 4-piston 380mm rear brake kits with two-piece rotors and custom 'Wagoneer' laser-etched calipers

Custom interior by Katzkin featuring full Nappa leather reupholstery in 'Obsidian Black' with 'Fathom Blue' contrast stitching, Alcantara headliner, and a custom roll cage integrated into the rear cargo area with a bolt-in harness bar for the second row, all paired with a custom Momo Prototipo steering wheel and a digital dash overlay by AEM
